pullRequest.title: Fix iotstrip child device time handling
pullRequest.body:
This PR fixes the time handling of the child devices for iotstrip to pull from the parent device time module instead of having each child with its own time module.

Closes #1445

pullRequest.title: Extend smartcam detection support
pullRequest.body:
New detection added with tests:

- bark detection
- glass detection
- line crossing detection
- meow detection
- vehicle detection

those module should be ready for home assistant, a change is needed into core repo adding more entity like [this one](https://github.com/home-assistant/core/blob/dev/homeassistant/components/tplink/switch.py#L76-L74) .

closes #1551

pullRequest.title: Implement IOT Time Module Failover
pullRequest.body: This PR creates failover in the IOT Time Module to handle issues where the system default time zone files don't have the correct time zone info.

pullRequest.title: Add hold state to thermostatstate
pullRequest.body:
This adds `hold_on` to the known states to allow downstreams handle the hold mode (idle, but heating if the temperature gets lower than the target).

Fixes #1608 - thanks to the reporter, https://github.com/home-assistant/core/pull/156310 was also created to improve the handling of unknown modes.

pullRequest.title: waterleaksensor: use parent's Time for alert timestamp
pullRequest.body:
We do not, by design, [add Time module for hub's children](
https://github.com/python-kasa/python-kasa/blob/347bf9a419d20089227cc4b9eaa2af257ef32b82/kasa/smart/modules/time.py#L86-L93).
This has a side-effect that we need to fallback to the parent's time module to allow presenting the correct timestamp for the last alert.

Fixes #1613

pullRequest.title: Fix mop set_waterlevel sending setCleanAttr without type field
pullRequest.body: Fixes https://github.com/python-kasa/python-kasa/issues/1666  by having set_waterlevel support an amended payload, and updating the test.
